'''thofakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:kludgy|kludgy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kludgy|kludgy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thofakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofakithi|thofakithi]] || [[word:thofakiji|thofakiji]] || [[word:thofakishi|thofakishi]] || [[word:thofakiki|thofakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofakuthuthu|thofakuthuthu]] || [[word:thofakujuju|thofakujuju]] || [[word:thofakushushu|thofakushushu]] || [[word:thofakukuku|thofakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakuthu|thofakuthu]] || [[word:thofakuju|thofakuju]] || [[word:thofakushu|thofakushu]] || [[word:thofakuku|thofakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakufthuf|thofakufthuf]] || [[word:thofakufjuf|thofakufjuf]] || [[word:thofakufshuf|thofakufshuf]] || [[word:thofakufkuf|thofakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofakethe|thofakethe]] || [[word:thofakeje|thofakeje]] || [[word:thofakeshe|thofakeshe]] || [[word:thofakeke|thofakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofakothotho|thofakothotho]] || [[word:thofakojojo|thofakojojo]] || [[word:thofakoshosho|thofakoshosho]] || [[word:thofakokoko|thofakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakotho|thofakotho]] || [[word:thofakojo|thofakojo]] || [[word:thofakosho|thofakosho]] || [[word:thofakoko|thofakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakofthof|thofakofthof]] || [[word:thofakofjof|thofakofjof]] || [[word:thofakofshof|thofakofshof]] || [[word:thofakofkof|thofakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofakïfthïf|thofakïfthïf]] || [[word:thofakïfjïf|thofakïfjïf]] || [[word:thofakïfshïf|thofakïfshïf]] || [[word:thofakïfkïf|thofakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofakïfthïfthïf|thofakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thofakïfjïfjïf|thofakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thofakïfshïfshïf|thofakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thofakïfkïfkïf|thofakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakïfthïf|thofakïfthïf]] || [[word:thofakïfjïf|thofakïfjïf]] || [[word:thofakïfshïf|thofakïfshïf]] || [[word:thofakïfkïf|thofakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakïfthïf|thofakïfthïf]] || [[word:thofakïfjïf|thofakïfjïf]] || [[word:thofakïfshïf|thofakïfshïf]] || [[word:thofakïfkïf|thofakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thofakæthæ|thofakæthæ]] || [[word:thofakæjæ|thofakæjæ]] || [[word:thofakæshæ|thofakæshæ]] || [[word:thofakækæ|thofakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thofakathatha|thofakathatha]] || [[word:thofakajaja|thofakajaja]] || [[word:thofakashasha|thofakashasha]] || [[word:thofakakaka|thofakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofakatha|thofakatha]] || [[word:thofakaja|thofakaja]] || [[word:thofakasha|thofakasha]] || [[word:thofakaka|thofakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofakafthaf|thofakafthaf]] || [[word:thofakafjaf|thofakafjaf]] || [[word:thofakafshaf|thofakafshaf]] || [[word:thofakafkaf|thofakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thofakasha|thofakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofakshësha|thofakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofakrosha|thofakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofakmusha|thofakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofakyasha|thofakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofaknkshësha|gothofaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofaknkrosha|gothofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofaknkmusha|gothofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofaknkyasha|gothofaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thofafakasha|thofafakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofafakshësha|thofafakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofafakrosha|thofafakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofafakmusha|thofafakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofafakyasha|thofafakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofafaknkshësha|gothofafaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofafaknkrosha|gothofafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofafaknkmusha|gothofafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofafaknkyasha|gothofafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thefækasha|thefækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thefækshësha|thefækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thefækrosha|thefækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thefækmusha|thefækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thefækyasha|thefækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothefæknkshësha|gothefæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothefæknkrosha|gothefæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothefæknkmusha|gothefæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothefæknkyasha|gothefæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thofakasha|thofakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thofakshësha|thofakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thofakrosha|thofakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thofakmusha|thofakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thofakyasha|thofakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothofaknkshësha|gothofaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothofaknkrosha|gothofaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothofaknkmusha|gothofaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothofaknkyasha|gothofaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
